extract: The Lost Hotel (Japanese: 荒れ果てホテル Desolate Hotel) is a former hotel in northern Kalos. The legendary Roller Skater "Twirling Whirlwind" (also "the Dancing Whirlwind"; Japanese: 踊るつむじ風 Dancing Whirlwind, also ダンシングトルネード Dancing Tornado) can be found here. He is only accessible once the player knows the first four roller-skating tricks, and he will teach the player the fifth and final trick.
